name: Pizza Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, imported, freshly grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a heavy skillet, sauté the sausages until brown and drain well. Transfer to a bowl and stir in Spicy Tomato Sauce. Reserve.
3. Mix Ricotta, Parmesan, half of the parsley, oregano, egg, and black pepper.
4. Spread half of the sausage mixture in an 9 x 13 inch ovenproof dish. Dot with ricotta mix and sprinkle 2 cups mozzarella evenly over the surface. Sprinkle with half of the remaining parsley and oregano.
5. Repeat steps 4 using the remaining ingredients.
6. Roll out three-quarters of the dough to a thickness of about 1/3 inch, ensuring it is at least 1 inch larger than the pan all around. Place on top, tucking in excess dough all around.
7. Beat remaining egg with 1 tablespoon water and brush some over the crust.
8. Roll out remaining dough for decorative shapes (if desired) using cookie cutters. Arrange shapes on top, brush again with beaten egg, and bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until golden brown and edges are bubbling.
9. Let pizza stand for 30 minutes before cutting.
